title: Typed Records, Missingness, Provenance, Validation, and Rejection · Language Clinic: Validation Rejection
summary: The scraper emits loose dictionaries, converts missing prices to zero, drops source locations, and keeps partly invalid rows because most fields look useful. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the validation rejection increment in typed provenance-preserving extraction record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theor…
objectives: Reject, quarantine, or downgrade records by explicit invariant and report the exact field, evidence, and repair owner.
Normalize Unicode, whitespace, units, dates, numbers, URLs, and labels only after preserving raw input and locale assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: scraper-validation-rejection — Reject, quarantine, or downgrade records by explicit invariant and report the exact field, evidence, and repair owner.
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-typed-records-provenance-3
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-typed-records-provenance-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader report review.
# Operating constraint: the target owner must be able to pause the crawl.
# Changed case: change malformed markup or parser choice and preserve extraction provenance.
def worked_scraper_typed_records_provenance_3(raw_records: int = 12, valid_records: int = 9, quarantined_records: int = 3, provenance_records: int = 12, schema_version: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorizationworked3",
        "url5798",
        "response3dekrow",
        "treeworked35798",
        "frontier5798worked3",
        "report3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if raw_records < 1 or valid_records < 0 or quarantined_records < 0:
        return False, raw_records, "record-count"
    if valid_records + quarantined_records != raw_records:
        return False, valid_records, "record-reconciliation"
    if provenance_records != raw_records:
        return False, provenance_records, "provenance-gap"
    if schema_version < 1:
        return False, schema_version, "schema-version"
    assert valid_records + quarantined_records == raw_records
    return True, valid_records, "typed-extraction-records"

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Build Validation Rejection evidence · Theory Validation Rejection
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: scraper-validation-rejection-1wejlx" that uses case 5694 to validate typed missingness, raw and normalized fields, provenance, schema identity, and explicit rejection. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, contact sites, import or claim native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, or Playwright behavior, read or write host files, use credentials, launch browsers, schedule host jobs, or claim live accessibility, privacy, legal, load, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, the recorded stable package versions, fixed and malformed fixtures, fake transports, controlled local servers, authorized disposable target sites, representative browser profiles, privacy, security, accessibility and legal review, load, migration, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-validation-rejection-1wejlx
# Competency: scraper-validation-rejection.
# Case 5694: a multilingual public-service site review.
# Operating constraint: the target owner must be able to pause the crawl.
# Changed case: introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it.
def evidence_scraper_validation_rejection_1wejlx(raw_records: int = 12, valid_records: int = 9, quarantined_records: int = 3, provenance_records: int = 12, schema_version: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1wejlx = "1wejlx-xljew1-5694"
    assert evidence_variant_1wejlx
    evidence_axes_1wejlx = (
        "authorization1wejlx",
        "url5694",
        "responsexljew1",
        "tree1wejlx5694",
        "frontier56941wejlx",
        "reportxljew15694",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1wejlx)) == 6
    if raw_records < 1 or valid_records < 0 or quarantined_records < 0:
        return False, raw_records, "record-count"
    if valid_records + quarantined_records != raw_records:
        return False, valid_records, "record-reconciliation"
    if provenance_records != raw_records:
        return False, provenance_records, "provenance-gap"
    if schema_version < 1:
        return False, schema_version, "schema-version"
    assert valid_records + quarantined_records == raw_records
    return True, valid_records, "typed-extraction-records"

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Validation Rejection structural check is only one gate. typed provenance-preserving extraction record must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

hints: For Authorized crawling and Python Build Validation Rejection evidence · Theory Validation Rejection, name the owner, authorization, stakeholder, revision, runtime, dependency, seed, URL, origin, robots, response, parser, selector, record, frontier, privacy, report, stop, recovery, and transfer boundary, Validation Rejection precondition, or invariant that must hold.

Build deterministic Python evidence to validate typed missingness, raw and normalized fields, provenance, schema identity, and explicit rejection; personal data must remain minimized and redacted; then change a robots, canonical, indexing, structured-data, or accessibility signal and retain the conflict. steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Validation Rejection model · Theory Validation Rejection
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Validation Rejection: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory site-quality team handles case 7138 during an authorized nonprofit content audit. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate typed missingness, raw and normalized fields, provenance, schema identity, and explicit rejection; the target owner must be able to pause the crawl; then change a robots, canonical, indexing, structured-data, or accessibility signal and retain the conflict. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Reject, quarantine, or downgrade records by explicit invariant and report the exact field, evidence, and repair owner.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.

checks.description: The cumulative python portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker # Evidence: scraper-validation-rejection-1wejlx.

checks.pattern: # Evidence: scraper-validation-rejection-1wejlx(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?def\s+evidence_scraper_validation_rejection_1wejlx\s*\((?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?\)\s*(?:->[^:]+)?\s*:(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?raw_records < 1 or valid_records < 0 or quarantined_records < 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?valid_records \+ quarantined_records != raw_records)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?provenance_records != raw_records)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?schema_version < 1)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?assert)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
